channel.title: GitHub Vue Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: Requarks/wiki
item.description: Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

item.title: ElemeFE/element
item.description: A Vue.js 2.0 UI Toolkit for Web

item.title: lin-xin/vue-manage-system
item.description: 基于Vue3 + Element Plus 的后台管理系统解决方案

item.title: zyrouge/yukino-app
item.description: Yukino lets you read manga or stream anime ad-free from multiple sources for free! Available for Windows, Linux, MacOS and Android.

item.title: anncwb/vue-vben-admin
item.description: A modern vue admin. It is based on Vue3, vite and TypeScript. It's fast！

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue-pro
item.description: 👨🏻‍💻👩🏻‍💻 Use Ant Design Vue like a Pro!

item.title: element-plus/element-plus
item.description: 🎉 A Vue.js 3.0 UI Library made by Element team

item.title: hoppscotch/hoppscotch
item.description: 👽 Open source API development ecosystem https://hoppscotch.io

item.title: PanJiaChen/vue-element-admin
item.description: 🎉 A magical vue admin https://panjiachen.github.io/vue-element-admin

item.title: MyEtherWallet/MyEtherWallet
item.description: MyEtherWallet (our friends call us MEW) is a free, client-side interface helping you interact with the Ethereum blockchain.

item.title: bailicangdu/vue2-elm
item.description: 基于 vue2 + vuex 构建一个具有 45 个页面的大型单页面应用

item.title: yangrds/batch-clip
item.description: 基于JavaScript的批量图片裁剪插件，支持功能：图片裁剪、批量图片载入、文件（File）加载、远程资源加载（URL）、图片缩放、原图载入。钩子函数：图片加载失败、程序中断、裁剪完毕。

item.title: salomonelli/best-resume-ever
item.description: 👔 💼 Build fast 🚀 and easy multiple beautiful resumes and create your best CV ever! Made with Vue and LESS.

item.title: GeekQiaQia/vue3.0-template-admin
item.description: 本项目基于vue3+ElementPlus+Typescript+Vite搭建一套通用的后台管理模板；并基于常见业务场景，抽象出常见功能组件；包括动态菜单，菜单权限、登录、个人中心、表单页、列表页、复制文本、二维码分享等等

item.title: airyland/vux
item.description: Mobile UI Components based on Vue & WeUI

item.title: newbee-ltd/vue3-admin
item.description: 🔥 🎉 Vue 3.0 + Vite 2.0 + Vue-Router 4.0 + Element-Plus + Echarts 5.0 + Axios 开发的后台管理系统

item.title: DataV-Team/DataV
item.description: Vue数据可视化组件库（类似阿里DataV，大屏数据展示），提供SVG的边框及装饰、图表、水位图、飞线图等组件，简单易用，长期更新(React版已发布)

item.title: xiaoxian521/vue-pure-admin
item.description: 🔥 ✨✨ ✨ Vue3.0+TypeScript+Vite2.0+Element-Plus编写的一套后台管理系统

item.title: iczer/vue-antd-admin
item.description: 🐜 Ant Design Pro's implementation with Vue

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue
item.description: 🌈 An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Vue. 🐜

item.title: newbee-ltd/newbee-mall-vue3-app
item.description: 🔥 🎉Vue3 全家桶 + Vant 搭建大型单页面商城项目，新蜂商城 Vue3 版本，技术栈为 Vue 3.0 + Vue-Router 4.0 + Vuex 4.0 + Vant 3.0。

item.title: statping/statping
item.description: Status Page for monitoring your websites and applications with beautiful graphs, analytics, and plugins. Run on any type of environment.

item.title: YanxinNet/uView
item.description: uView UI，是uni-app生态最优秀的UI框架，全面的组件和便捷的工具会让您信手拈来，如鱼得水

item.title: JakHuang/form-generator
item.description: ✨Element UI表单设计及代码生成器

item.title: RainManGO/vue3-composition-admin
item.description: 🎉 基于vue3 的管理端模板(Vue3 TS Vuex4 element-plus vue-i18n-next composition-api) vue3-admin vue3-ts-admin
